creator: cyberbotx@cyberbotx.com
text:
Sorry it took me so long to get back on this, but I have updated pkg-plist 
properly.  It hadn't occured to me that I never did this in the first place, but 
I was able to fix it by running the port in tinderbox.  I also verified that the 
port will build properly under a non-standard PREFIX, assuming that 
devel/mingw32-bin-msvcrt and devel/mingw32-binutils are also built under the 
same non-standard PREFIX (which was possible in a tinderbox but not under my 
live system).  I'm attaching a new diff to the port, including one new patch in 
the files directory.

Thanks,
Naram Qashat
